expected.title: OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

text:
Here's the full summary:

**1. Found the top unresolved Sentry issue:**

| ID | Title | Event Count | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| SENTRY-3029 | OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events | 4,665 | Unresolved |

**2. Sent email with the following details:**

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| From | engineering@acme.io |
| To | oncall@acme.io |
| Subject | Top error |
| Body | OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events |

**3. Confirmed:** The email was successfully inserted into the emails table with the subject *"Top error"* and the body containing the exact title *"OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events"* — sent to `oncall@acme.io`. ✅

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'sentry_issues'"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id, title, count, status FROM sentry_issues WHERE status = 'unresolved' ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'emails'"}

tool_calls.name: explain_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"INSERT INTO emails (from_addr, to_addr, subject, body) VALUES ('engineering@acme.io', 'oncall@acme.io', 'Top error', 'OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events')"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"INSERT INTO emails (from_addr, to_addr, subject, body) VALUES ('engineering@acme.io', 'oncall@acme.io', 'Top error', 'OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events')"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id, from_addr, to_addr, subject, body, date FROM emails WHERE to_addr = 'oncall@acme.io' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1"}
